title: The Chase Moves Toward the Sea Forest
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows Shirahoshi, Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Luffy, Narrator, Jinbe, Vander Decken. The core story beat is the chase moves toward the sea forest.
scene: The scene centers on the chase moves toward the sea forest, with Shirahoshi, Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Luffy, Narrator, Jinbe, Vander Decken driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: P... P... Princess!! Why are you untying his ropes?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will be back in time for dinner!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My toof!!! He broke my toof!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go, crybaby!! to the ocean forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: two women, a pirate and a mermaid...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you sure about this, nami-chin?! leaving the others behind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, you couldn't carry all of us, could you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry. There's never been a situation those guys couldn't handle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know that your crew are all strong, but still... Hacchan warned me about hordy. He's really strong too, and his mind works in dangerous ways...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Caimie. Could you tell me a little about the former Shichibukai jimbei?

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Huh? Well, um... boss Jinbe is... he's a pirate, but he's trusted enough to be able to visit the Palace freely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see... but he was in the same crew as Arlong once, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that man, hordy... he thinks of himself as Arlong's successor...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: I'm just thinking about jimbei's message for Luffy. "Do not fight with hordy"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I think I might know why he said that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just hope zero and the others don't end up angering hordy too badly as a result of this incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At any rate... I have to meet jimbel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He said he was waiting in the ocean forest, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's more to this incident than meets the eye... and I get the feeling he knows exactly what's going on...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Caimie... Take me to the ocean forest!

summary: The Chase Moves Toward the Sea Forest. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
